name: claude-tech-squad
description: Software delivery squad — 81 agents and 29 skills covering discovery, implementation, review, security, and release. Stack-aware routing for Django, React, Vue, TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, Ruby, PHP, .NET, Elixir. Embedded squad-cli with preflight, doom-loop detection, checkpoints, cost guardrails, SEP logs. Dedicated LLM/AI bench and audit skills (LGPD/GDPR/PCI/SOC2). See README for the full catalog.
